'''kahata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachdog|coachdog]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachdog|coachdog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kahata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæhætæth|kæhætæth]] || [[word:kæhætæj|kæhætæj]] || [[word:kæhætæsh|kæhætæsh]] || [[word:kæhætæ|kæhætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kahahatath|kahahatath]] || [[word:kahahataj|kahahataj]] || [[word:kahahatash|kahahatash]] || [[word:kahahata|kahahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kahatath|kahatath]] || [[word:kahataj|kahataj]] || [[word:kahatash|kahatash]] || [[word:kahata|kahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kahaftath|kahaftath]] || [[word:kahaftaj|kahaftaj]] || [[word:kahaftash|kahaftash]] || [[word:kahaftaf|kahaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kahatatha|kahatatha]] || [[word:kahataja|kahataja]] || [[word:kahatasha|kahatasha]] || [[word:kahataka|kahataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kahatath|kahatath]] || [[word:kahataj|kahataj]] || [[word:kahatash|kahatash]] || [[word:kahata|kahata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kahatathal|kahatathal]] || [[word:kahatajal|kahatajal]] || [[word:kahatashal|kahatashal]] || [[word:kahatakal|kahatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kahatathatha|kahatathatha]] || [[word:kahatajaja|kahatajaja]] || [[word:kahatashasha|kahatashasha]] || [[word:kahataka|kahataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kahatathan|kahatathan]] || [[word:kahatajan|kahatajan]] || [[word:kahatashan|kahatashan]] || [[word:kahatakan|kahatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kahatathaoro|kahatathaoro]] || [[word:kahatajaoro|kahatajaoro]] || [[word:kahatashaoro|kahatashaoro]] || [[word:kahatakaoro|kahatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
